data.title: Eastern Union closed loans with 150 lenders in 2025, 1/3 from new lenders, a major feat for the real estate brokerage.
data.description: In 2025, Eastern Union, a major commercial real estate brokerage in the US, successfully secured and closed loans with a total of 150 lenders, marking a significant achievement for the company. This accounts for approximately one-third of all commercial mortgages arranged throughout the year. By actively cultivating new partnerships and expanding their network, Eastern Union continues to establish itself as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Riley Permian (REPX) declares $0.40 quarterly dividend for common stock. Board of Directors approved.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in Oklahoma City, Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. (NYSE American: REPX) disclosed that their Board of Directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.40 per share on the Company's common stock.

data.title: Burton debuts 'From Burton to the World' collection in Aspen & Laax with limited edition items showcasing Jake Burton quotes.
data.description: Burlington, Vermont - On January 9, 2026, Burton revealed the 'From Burton to the World' limited edition collection. This drop includes snowboards, apparel, and accessories emblazoned with iconic quotes from Jake Burton. The collection is a celebration of Burton's legacy and influence and is available for a limited time only.

data.title: SB360, Hilco Global, and Gordon Brothers to operate GOB sales at remaining Value City Furniture & American Signature Furniture stores with discounts of 25-50% off entire inventory.
data.description: A consortium consisting of SB360 Capital Partners, Hilco Global, and Gordon Brothers has been granted approval by the bankruptcy court to conduct Going Out of Business (GOB) sales in Boston. The sale offers discounts ranging from 25% to 50% off on the entire inventory until supplies last. This presents a significant opportunity for customers to avail of substantial savings on a wide range of products.

data.title: Bitmine appoints Young Kim as CFO and COO. Owns 3.43% of ETH token supply, targets 5%. Stockholder meeting on Jan 15, 2026 at Wynn Las Vegas.
data.description: Young Kim, an experienced professional in finance, venture capital, and engineering, has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Chief Operating Officer (COO) at Bitmine. This appointment is effective immediately. Bitmine currently holds 3.43% of the Ethereum (ETH) token supply, indicating significant ownership in the market. The company aims to reach the 'Alchemy of 5%' by owning two-thirds of this target. Bitmine has scheduled its Annual Stockholder Meeting to take place on January 15, 2026, at the Wynn Las Vegas.

data.title: Mito Red Light partners with Auston Matthews, highlighting benefits of red light therapy in sports performance.
data.description: In a press release on January 9, 2026, Mito Red Light of Scottsdale, Arizona revealed a new partnership emphasizing the increasing importance of advanced red light therapy in enhancing elite athletic performance and promoting recovery. The collaboration signifies a strategic endorsement by Mito Red Light, known for their innovative light therapy products, underscoring the rising trend of utilizing such technology in the realm of athletics.

data.title: Scienjoy Holding Corporation (NASDAQ: SJ) granted 180-day extension by Nasdaq to meet minimum bid price rule.
data.description: On January 7, 2026, Scienjoy Holding Corporation, a prominent player in the interactive entertainment sector in China and listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SJ, disclosed that it had been informed by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC regarding a certain matter. This development was made public by the company on January 9, 2026, marking another significant event in its journey.

data.title: Evolus reports preliminary unaudited net revenue for Q4 & full-year 2025, awaits audit completion.
data.description: Evolus, Inc., a leading beauty company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol EOLS, disclosed its preliminary unaudited net revenue figures for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company, headquartered in Newport Beach, California, specializes in developing an aesthetic product portfolio. These initial unaudited results, as announced today, are subject to potential modifications until the conclusion of the audit for the financial outcomes of 2025.

data.title: Investors eye Bank of America's Q4 earnings expecting 96 cents per share, $27.62B revenue. Annual dividend yield is 1.99%, $500 monthly possible.
data.description: Investors are closely watching Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) as they prepare for its upcoming earnings report. Analysts predict the bank will announce fourth-quarter earnings of 96 cents per share when they release their report on January 14. This represents an increase from the 82 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for Bank of America's quarterly revenue stands at $27.62 billion, up from the $25.35 billion recorded last year. Currently, Bank of America offers an annual dividend yield of 1.99%, equating to a quarterly dividend of 28 cents per share ($1.12 annually). Investors are exploring ways to leverage this dividend yield to earn a consistent $500 per month. For more details, readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: UK subsidiary of Ripple is approved as Electronic Money Institution, allowing it to offer payment services, but some crypto activities have restrictions.
data.description: The UK subsidiary of Ripple has obtained regulatory approval as an Electronic Money Institution to offer payment services. However, it is subject to restrictions on specific cryptocurrency operations. The approval allows Ripple's UK arm to facilitate financial transactions and provide payment solutions within established guidelines. This development marks a significant milestone for Ripple in the UK market, as it enhances the company's ability to engage in electronic money activities. While this approval opens up avenues for expanded payment services, the subsidiary must adhere to limitations on certain crypto-related functions to ensure compliance with regulatory frameworks.

data.title: Research report on Aircraft Safety MRO projects market to reach $701.9 million by 2035, growing at 3.5% CAGR.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Aircraft Safety MRO Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at US$503.3 million in 2024 and is projected to reach US$701.9 million by 2035, with a steady CAGR of 3.5% anticipated during the forecast period. Factors driving this growth include the advancement of digital technologies, the expansion of global fleet sizes, and an increase in demand for aircraft safety maintenance, repair, and operations services.
